title: First Private Round Pool opens on Cryptool
content_html:
The first Private Round Pool on Cryptool is open.

The pool gives platform users access to an exclusive early-stage investment opportunity, with the underlying mechanics handled end to end on Cryptool. Anyone can take part: there is no whitelist gate.

Three things to note before joining:

  • Slots are limited and fill on a first-come basis
  • The referral programme is fully active on this pool, so anyone who brings their community in earns revenue share on every deposit
  • All positions are visible inside the Cryptool dApp from the moment you contribute, with full tracking through to distribution

The pool is live now in the Raise section.
author: Cryptool
